entities.name: PLANT GENETIC RESOURCES
entities.description: Components of biodiversity including primitive forms of cultivated plants, landraces, modern cultivars, obsolete cultivars, breeding lines, genetic stocks, weedy types, and related wild species

entities.name: BIODIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of life in the world or in a particular habitat or ecosystem

entities.name: GENETIC VARIATION
entities.description: The diversity in gene frequencies that must be conserved to combat pests and diseases and adapt to changing environments

entities.name: PESTS
entities.description: Organisms that cause damage to crops and must be combated using genetic variation

entities.name: DISEASES
entities.description: Pathological conditions affecting plants that must be combated using genetic variation

entities.name: CHANGING ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Shifts in environmental conditions requiring better adapted varieties

entities.name: SEED CONSERVATION
entities.description: A cost-effective and simple method for preserving genetic variability and maintaining genetic stability

entities.name: GENETIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: The diversity of genetic characteristics preserved through seed conservation

entities.name: GENETIC STABILITY
entities.description: The maintenance of genetic information over long time periods through seed conservation

entities.name: EX SITU COLLECTIONS
entities.description: Conservation of biological diversity outside their natural habitats, involving conservation, characterization, and utilization

entities.name: CONSERVATION
entities.description: The process of preserving genetic resources

entities.name: CHARACTERIZATION
entities.description: The process of identifying and describing traits of conserved germplasm

entities.name: UTILIZATION
entities.description: The use of conserved genetic resources for breeding and improvement

entities.name: CONSERVED GERMPLASM
entities.description: Genetic material preserved for future use in conservation, characterization, and utilization
